use_cases: Displaying product features on landing pages to highlight key capabilities
Showcasing service offerings with visual cards and brief descriptions
Creating feature grids for SaaS and fintech product pages
Highlighting product benefits with interactive hover animations
Organizing and presenting multiple features in a clean card-based layout
ai_summary: A feature showcase section component that displays product capabilities using a card-based layout with images and descriptive text. Features smooth hover lift animations and a minimalist flat design style, making it ideal for SaaS, fintech, and e-commerce landing pages to highlight key product features and services.
